infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VasoolAI stamps every collection with GPS so the owner can verify the agent was at the borrower's location.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Take a receipt photo for expenses ≥ ₹100 and capture borrower ID photos for KYC.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pick an existing receipt or ID photo from your gallery.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Quickly fill in a new borrower's name and phone from your contacts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VasoolAI uses the mic for voice-driven amount entry.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: VasoolAI needs location to stamp collections with GPS.

plugins.photosPermission: Pick a receipt or ID photo for KYC and expense proof.
plugins.cameraPermission: Capture a receipt photo for expenses or borrower ID.
